Rarity: Unique

Gauze Wraps

Evasion Rating: 15 (augmented)

Item Level: 79
--------
{ Unique Modifier — Evasion, Energy Shield }
43(30-50)% increased Evasion and Energy Shield
{ Unique Modifier — Attack, Speed }
6(4-6)% increased Attack Speed
{ Unique Modifier — Elemental, Ailment }
Cannot inflict Elemental Ailments — Unscalable Value
{ Unique Modifier }
All Damage from Hits Contributes to Poison Magnitude — Unscalable Value
{ Unique Modifier — Ailment }
29(20-30)% chance to Poison on Hit
--------
Ulcers, scabs, and pocks, the third army makes its claim.
